sections.paragraph:
ἐπιλαμβάνω [ἐπί, λαμβάνω; ‘take/get besides, receive’] in NT only in mid.

—1. take/lay hold of

—a. with intention of helping Mt 14:31; Mk 8:23; Lk 9:47; Hb 8:9. Cp. Hb 2:16 (because of the fear of death vs. 15, Abraham’s seed requires assistance).

—b. with intention of using for a specific purpose Lk 23:26; Ac 9:27; 17:19; 23:19.

—c. with intention of making one’s own: in imagery, of eternal life 1 Ti 6:12; sim. vs. 19.

—2. ‘take hold forcefully’, catch, Lk 20:20, 26;seize Ac 16:19; 21:30; arrest 21:33.
